**Your contribution folder:**
<!-- e.g. contributions/user-3f9a/ -->

**Confirm it's yours:**

Easiest proof: open this issue from the same GitHub account that submitted the contribution PR.
If that's not possible, tell us how we can confirm.
-->

We'll remove it. You can also just open a PR that deletes your folder.
